name: Agile Armor
benefit: The armor's Maximum Dexterity Bonus increases by 1.

name: Fortifying Armor
benefit: The armor's equipment bonus to Fortitude Defense increases by 1.

name: Protective Armor
benefit: The armor's armor bonus to Reflex Defense increases by 1.

name: Enhanced Strength
benefit: Increase the device's Strength score by 2.

name: Improved Durability
benefit: The device's Damage Reduction increases by 1 and it gains extra Hit Points equal to one-quarter of its maximum Hit Points.

name: Mastercraft Device
benefit: Skill checks made using the device gain a +1 equipment bonus, or its existing equipment bonus increases by 1.

name: Additional Upgrade Slot
benefit: Install one additional upgrade slot. This modification can be made only once.

name: Enhanced Dexterity
benefit: Increase the droid's Dexterity score by 2.

name: Enhanced Intelligence
benefit: Increase the droid's Intelligence score by 2.

name: Enhanced Strength
benefit: Increase the droid's Strength score by 2.

name: Enhanced Dexterity
benefit: Increase the vehicle's Dexterity score by 2.

name: Improved Shields
benefit: Increase the vehicle's Shield Rating by 5.

name: Improved Speed
benefit: Increase the vehicle's speed by one-quarter of its base speed, minimum 1 square.

name: Improved Accuracy
benefit: The weapon gains a +1 equipment bonus on attack rolls.

name: Improved Damage
benefit: The weapon deals +2 points of damage with a successful hit.

name: Selective Fire
benefit: An autofire-only ranged weapon can fire single shots, or a single-shot weapon can gain autofire mode.

name: Mobile Armor
benefit: Increase speed by 1 square; Medium or Heavy armor only.

name: Reinforced Armor
benefit: Grants Damage Reduction 2.

name: Superior Agile Armor
benefit: The armor's maximum Dexterity bonus increases by +2.

name: Superior Fortifying Armor
benefit: The armor's equipment bonus to Fortitude Defense increases by +2.

name: Superior Helmet Package
benefit: Grants wearer a +5 equipment bonus on Perception checks.

name: Superior Protective Armor
benefit: The armor's armor bonus to Reflex Defense increases by +2.

name: Superior Strength
benefit: Increase the device's Strength score by +4.

name: Superior Durability
benefit: The device's Damage Reduction increases by +2, and increase its Hit Points by 150%.

name: Reinforced Device
benefit: The device's Break DC increases by +5.

name: Superior Mastercraft
benefit: Skill checks made using the device gain a +2 equipment bonus, or its existing equipment bonus increases by +2.

name: Ion Dispersal Coating
benefit: Droid gains Damage Reduction 5 against Ion damage.

name: Superior Ability: Dexterity
benefit: Increase the droid's Dexterity score by +4.

name: Superior Ability: Intelligence
benefit: Increase the droid's Intelligence score by +4.

name: Superior Ability: Strength
benefit: Increase the droid's Strength score by +4.

name: Superior Ability: Dexterity
benefit: Increase the vehicle's Dexterity by +4.

name: Superior Ability: Strength
benefit: Increase the vehicle's Strength by +2.

name: Superior Sensors
benefit: Increase the vehicle's Perception modifier by +2.

name: Superior Shields
benefit: Increase the vehicle's Shield Rating by +10.

name: Superior Speed
benefit: Increase the vehicle's speed by one-third of its base speed, minimum 1 square.

name: Superior Accuracy
benefit: The weapon gains a +2 equipment bonus on attack rolls.

name: Superior Capacity
benefit: The weapon's power pack provides double the number of shots.

name: Superior Damage
benefit: The weapon deals +5 damage with a successful hit.

name: Superior Range
benefit: The weapon's ranges all increase by 50%.
